content.situation: 乘客在机场柜台询问托运行李的免费额度和尺寸限制
content.speakerText: Could you tell me about the baggage allowance for my flight?
content.speakerTextCn: 您能告诉我我的航班的行李额度吗？

blanks.answer: one checked bag and one carry-on
options: one checked bag and one carry-on

content.hint: 通常航空公司允许每位乘客免费托运一件行李并携带一件随身行李。

content.situation: 乘客在值机前向工作人员确认随身行李的尺寸是否符合规定
content.speakerText: Is this suitcase okay as a carry-on?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个行李箱可以作为随身行李吗？
content.responseTemplate: It should be fine as long as it doesn't exceed ___.
content.hint: 随身行李的规定通常关注的是尺寸，而不是重量或数量。
content.knowledgePoint: 行李尺寸限制的正确表达

content.situation: 乘客在登机口询问是否可以额外带一个背包作为随身物品
content.speakerText: Can I also bring a small backpack along with my carry-on?
content.speakerTextCn: 除了随身行李，我还能再带一个双肩包吗？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, most airlines allow ___ in addition to your main carry-on.
content.hint: 航空公司通常允许在随身行李之外再带一件小型个人物品，如背包或手提包。
